cvePublicationCount.name: Published CVE Count
cvePublicationCount.numerator: Active (non-rejected) NVD CVE records published in window
cvePublicationCount.censoringPolicy: Excludes REJECTED CVEs; incomplete current month is flagged as partial
cvePublicationCount.knownBiases: Increases when CNA reporting activity grows, regardless of true software vulnerability prevalence.

severityShare.name: CVSS Base Severity Distribution Share
severityShare.numerator: Published CVEs assigned a specific CVSS base severity band (CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW)
severityShare.denominator: All CVSS-scored published CVEs in window
severityShare.censoringPolicy: Prefers primary assessment over secondary; selects v4.0 -> v3.1 -> v3.0 -> v2. Scores of 0.0 are assigned to NONE; records without CVSS remain UNKNOWN/Unscored.
severityShare.knownBiases: Different CVSS versions (v2 vs v3 vs v4) use different baseline distributions and are not directly comparable.

publicExploitShare.name: Public Exploit Reference Share
publicExploitShare.numerator: CVEs with at least one NVD reference tagged with type 'Exploit'
publicExploitShare.censoringPolicy: Requires 180-day maturity window to avoid CNA tag ingestion lag. Comparison is withheld if either period lacks mature data.
publicExploitShare.knownBiases: Tags indicate linked public material on NVD references; they do not verify exploit validity or execution capability.

observedKevShare.name: CISA KEV Listing Share
observedKevShare.numerator: Published CVEs listed in CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog
observedKevShare.denominator: All active NVD published CVEs in window
observedKevShare.dateSemantics: NVD publication date for cohort; CISA dateAdded for KEV addition
observedKevShare.censoringPolicy: Filtered by observation date cutoff (added <= snapshot_date)
observedKevShare.knownBiases: Reflects CISA prioritization and catalog addition criteria; not an exhaustive index of all worldwide exploitation.

medianPublicationToKevGap.name: Median Publication-to-KEV Gap among KEV-listed CVEs
medianPublicationToKevGap.formula: median((cisa_kev.dateAdded - nvd_cve.published).days for cve in mature_cohort if cve in KEV)
medianPublicationToKevGap.numerator: Signed day difference between NVD publication date and CISA KEV dateAdded
medianPublicationToKevGap.denominator: KEV-listed CVEs in mature cohort (kevTimingSample / matureCohort)
medianPublicationToKevGap.dateSemantics: NVD publication date (cve.published) and CISA KEV listing date (dateAdded)
medianPublicationToKevGap.censoringPolicy: Calculated only for mature cohort (published <= snapshot_date - 90 days) to prevent right-censoring bias. Retains signed difference (negative values indicate pre-publication KEV listing).
medianPublicationToKevGap.knownBiases: This is a selected-outcome metric computed ONLY among KEV-listed CVEs; it does not measure the time-to-KEV for unlisted CVEs.

nonNegativePublicationToKevGap.name: Post-Publication Median Gap to KEV
nonNegativePublicationToKevGap.formula: median((dateAdded - published).days for cve in mature_cohort if cve in KEV and (dateAdded - published).days >= 0)
nonNegativePublicationToKevGap.numerator: Non-negative day differences for KEV listings added on or after NVD publication date
nonNegativePublicationToKevGap.denominator: Post-publication KEV-listed CVEs in mature cohort
nonNegativePublicationToKevGap.dateSemantics: NVD publication date and CISA KEV listing date
nonNegativePublicationToKevGap.censoringPolicy: Excludes pre-publication KEV cases where dateAdded predates NVD publication.
nonNegativePublicationToKevGap.knownBiases: Excludes pre-publication listings caused by NVD publication lag or CNA advance disclosures.

kevWithin90DayRate.name: Share of Mature Published CVEs Entering KEV within 90 Days
kevWithin90DayRate.formula: count(mature_cves listed in KEV within 90 days of publication) / count(mature_published_cves)
kevWithin90DayRate.denominator: All mature published CVEs (published <= snapshot_date - 90 days)
kevWithin90DayRate.dateSemantics: NVD publication date and CISA KEV dateAdded
kevWithin90DayRate.censoringPolicy: Excludes CVEs published in the latest 90 days to prevent right-censoring bias.
kevWithin90DayRate.knownBiases: Measures overall cohort risk of KEV entry within 90 days; distinct from the share of KEVs added within 90 days.

allCveKevConversionRate.name: All-CVE KEV Conversion Rate
allCveKevConversionRate.numerator: Mature published CVEs listed in CISA KEV
allCveKevConversionRate.censoringPolicy: Evaluated on mature publication cohort (published <= snapshot_date - 90 days)
allCveKevConversionRate.knownBiases: Baseline conversion rate for any published vulnerability to enter KEV.

exploitRefKevConversionRate.name: Exploit-Reference Tagged KEV Conversion Rate
exploitRefKevConversionRate.numerator: Mature published CVEs with NVD Exploit tag that are listed in CISA KEV
exploitRefKevConversionRate.denominator: All mature published CVEs with NVD Exploit reference tag
exploitRefKevConversionRate.censoringPolicy: Evaluated on mature cohort (published <= snapshot_date - 180 days)
exploitRefKevConversionRate.knownBiases: Demonstrates the increased likelihood of KEV listing when a public exploit reference tag is present.

epssHighNotInKevShare.name: EPSS Threshold Candidates Not in KEV
epssHighNotInKevShare.formula: count(published_cves where epss >= 0.10 and cveNotInKEV) / count(published_cves where epss >= 0.10)
epssHighNotInKevShare.numerator: Published CVEs with current EPSS >= 0.10 not listed in CISA KEV
epssHighNotInKevShare.denominator: All published CVEs meeting current EPSS >= 0.10 threshold
epssHighNotInKevShare.dateSemantics: NVD publication date for cohort; current FIRST EPSS snapshot score date
epssHighNotInKevShare.censoringPolicy: Uses current score snapshot applied across publication cohorts; not historical EPSS scores.
epssHighNotInKevShare.knownBiases: EPSS >= 0.10 is a project-defined screening threshold (dynamically ~top 2.1% of scored CVEs), not an official severity band.

epssScreeningWatch.name: EPSS Screening Watch
epssScreeningWatch.formula: active_nvd_cves published in latest 90 days with current EPSS >= 0.10 and not listed in CISA KEV
epssScreeningWatch.denominator: N/A (full list retained for tile inspection)
epssScreeningWatch.dateSemantics: CVE published in latest 90 days; EPSS current snapshot date
epssScreeningWatch.censoringPolicy: Retains every qualifying candidate row; filtered strictly by absence from CISA KEV
epssScreeningWatch.knownBiases: A project-defined analytical screening list based solely on current EPSS and KEV status; not an asset-specific remediation order or patch priority queue.

cvssAuthorityMix.name: CVSS Assessment-Type Mix
cvssAuthorityMix.numerator: Count of scored CVEs classified as Primary or Secondary assessment type
cvssAuthorityMix.dateSemantics: Current NVD JSON 2.0 metrics array type field
cvssAuthorityMix.censoringPolicy: Takes Primary assessment type first when available; falls back to Secondary when Primary is absent.
cvssAuthorityMix.knownBiases: Primary assessments originate from NVD or provider-level CNAs; Secondary assessments originate from other CNAs/vendors.

epssSubsequentKevEntryRate.name: Historical EPSS >= 0.10 Subsequent KEV-Entry Rate
epssSubsequentKevEntryRate.formula: conversionRate = candidateAdditions / candidateCount; baselineRate = totalKevAdditions / baselineCount; lift = conversionRate / baselineRate; recall = candidateAdditions / totalKevAdditions
epssSubsequentKevEntryRate.numerator: Count of CVEs exceeding historical EPSS threshold (or overall baseline) that subsequently entered CISA KEV within 30, 60, or 90 days
epssSubsequentKevEntryRate.denominator: Historical EPSS candidate cohort (CVEs with EPSS >= 0.10 not yet in KEV at snapshot date)
epssSubsequentKevEntryRate.dateSemantics: Dated historical EPSS snapshot date and CISA KEV dateAdded
epssSubsequentKevEntryRate.censoringPolicy: Each horizon (30d, 60d, 90d) is calculated ONLY when age_days >= horizon_days; incomplete horizons return null (Not mature) to eliminate right-censoring bias.
epssSubsequentKevEntryRate.knownBiases: Measures historical CISA KEV listing conversion, lift, and recall for EPSS >= 0.10 candidates; not an exhaustive index of all worldwide exploitation.
